title: fraxinus greggii
intro: Fraxinus greggii, also known as the desert ash, is a deciduous tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is often employed to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Fraxinus greggii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in herbal remedies.
